answers.body:
Instead of changing it to JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS="-Dos.name=Windows 7"

Change it to JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS="-Dos.name=Windows Server 2019"

Be sure to include the quotes

1. Control Panel
  2. System and Security
  3. System
  4. Click Advanced system settings in the left pane.
  5. In the Advanced tab, click Environment Variables
  6. Under System Variables, click New

Set:

JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS= "-Dos.name=Windows 7"

or

JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS="-Dos.name=Windows Server 2019"

make sure and include the quotation marks as they are written in the Parameters value).

  1. Click OK

I encountered the same problem because the version of Java included in the installer was incompatible with the OS. I solved the problem by choosing a version supported by the system via cmd: installyour

soft.exe LAX_VM C:\Program Files\Java\jre1.8.0_121\jre1.8.0_121\bin\java.exe

title: Trouble with Windows 11 DLL during launching a installer
body:
I'm trying to install a specific product, however before the installation launcher start the configuration. a pop up shows an error with a DLL. This occurs on Windows 11.

The error shows as follows:

Flexeraaxd$aaa: Windows DLL failed to load at Flexeraaxd.af(Unknown Source) 
    at Flexeraaxd.aa(Unknown Source) 
    at com.zerog.ia.installer.LifeCycleManager.init(Unknown Source) 
    at com.zerog.ia.installer.LifeCycleManager.executeApplication(Unknown Source) at com.zerog.ia.installer.Main.main(Unknown Source) 
    at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method) 
    at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:77) 
    at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43) 
    at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) 
    at com.zerog.lax.LAX.launch(Unknown Source) 
    at com.zerog.lax.LAX.main(Unknown Source)

I have already JRE 1.8.0 installed, jdk-11.0.11. I have tried set the variable JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS="-Dos.name=Windows 7", but it did not work. I have tried to run the installer on compatibility mode (W8 / W7) without success.
